nodes.name: 错误信息：sn或单据编号不能为空

parameters.query:
SELECT md.* 
FROM mes.mes.machine_data AS md 
WHERE md.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }} 
  AND md.procedure_detail_id = 79
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM mes.mes.machine_data AS md2 
    WHERE md2.procedure_detail_id = 91 
      AND md2.createtime > md.createtime
      AND md2.retroid_id = md.retroid_id
      AND md2.data->>'procedure_detail_id_old'='79'
  )

nodes.name: 判断查询整个工单号还是查询单独的SN

parameters.query:
SELECT  
  m.retroid_id,
  r.retroid as sn,
  m.data,
  m.createtime,
  m.procedure_detail_id 
FROM mes.mes.machine_data m 
JOIN mes.mes.retroid as r on m.retroid_id=r.retroid_id and r.status<3
WHERE 
  -- 修改处：使用 COALESCE 兼容 jobNumber 和 ticketNo，优先取 jobNumber，没有则取 ticketNo
  COALESCE(m.data->>'jobNumber', m.data->>'ticketNo') = '{{ $json.jobNumber }}'
  
  AND m.procedure_detail_id = {{ $('Webhook').all()[0].json.body.procedure_detail_id }}
  -- 移除子查询中的 procedure_detail_id 限制，确保检测所有删除标记
  AND not EXISTS (
      SELECT * 
    FROM mes.mes.machine_data m2 
    WHERE 
      m2.retroid_id=m.retroid_id and
      (m2.data::jsonb) ? 'machine_data_id_old'  -- 删除标记识别条件
      and (m2.data->>'procedure_detail_id_old')::integer = {{ Number($('Webhook').all()[0].json.body.procedure_detail_id) }}
      and m2.createtime>m.createtime
  )
  ORDER BY m.createtime ASC

main.node: 判断查询整个工单号还是查询单独的SN
错误信息：sn或单据编号不能为空
